title: Frosty Duck Relish Delight
description: A unique fusion of sweet and savory flavors. This dish is perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Season the duck breast with salt and pepper.
Place the duck in a baking dish and roast for 20 minutes.
Meanwhile, mix the frosty and relish in a bowl.
After 20 minutes, remove the duck from the oven and let it rest.
Slice the duck into thin strips.
Serve the duck strips with the frosty-relish mixture on top.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
